metadata.description: Multi-turn VQA — wrong-way driver on highway ramp. Each item is one (question, answer) pair from the original conversation; the system prompt is inlined into the first item's question.

items.question:
[System] You are an expert traffic analyst. Answer questions about the provided video concisely and accurately.

How many vehicles are visible in this clip?
items.answer: Four vehicles are visible: three traveling in the correct direction on the highway ramp and one traveling in the wrong direction against oncoming traffic.

items.question: Is there an anomalous event? If so, describe it and estimate when it occurs.
items.answer: Yes. Starting at approximately 00:02, a light-colored SUV is driving the wrong way on the highway on-ramp, heading directly toward oncoming vehicles. The event persists until the end of the clip at 00:09. The other drivers swerve to avoid a collision. This constitutes a wrong-way driving violation.
